title: Copper Horseshoes
description: Use copper to craft horseshoes to upgrade your horse's speed and jump.
body:
## Copper Horseshoes
Craft horseshoes with copper ingots in a U pattern.

Put the horseshoe in the body slot of the horse to upgrade its jump and speed.

When equipped with horseshoes, you can use the sprint key to run faster on horseback.

As you travel, the horseshoe's durability will decrease.

## Goat Horns
Use the "Call" goat horn and your horses will teleport to you similar to other pets, like dogs and cats.
